instruction: The functions process_admins, process_managers, and process_engineers in util.py duplicate the same filter+normalize logic with only the role string differing. Refactor util.py to share the common logic via a single PRIVATE helper function (name starting with '_'). The role string must be a parameter to the helper, not a literal inside each public function. The public API must NOT change: process_admins, process_managers, and process_engineers must all remain importable from util with the same names and behavior. All tests in tests/test_util.py must continue to pass.
calibration_note: Hardened 2026-04-25 (option 3). Added: role-string-must-be-parameterized check, private-helper-must-exist check. See docs/PROJECT_KNOWLEDGE_BASE.md §28.3.
